name: WebViewCG — Android WebView Plugin for Godot 4
short_description: Fully customisable Android WebView plugin for Godot 4.4 — multi-tab, JS bridge, full layout control & native close button.
description:

✨ What You Get:
🗂️ Multi-Tab Support - Create and manage multiple WebView tabs independently
📐 Full Layout Control - Pixel-perfect size & position, percentage-based sizing, anchor presets
🌐 Load URLs & Raw HTML - Directly from GDScript
🧭 Navigation Controls - Back, Forward, Reload, Stop, history management

name: AI NPC with Voice for Godot 4
short_description: A fully self-contained AI conversational NPC system for Godot 4 with voice support — no external scenes required.
description:
🤖 CG NPC — Plug-and-Play AI NPCs with Voice for Godot 4

✨ Key Features:
🧠 AI-Powered Conversations - Real-time responses using Groq AI (Llama 3.3 70B), each NPC has its own name, personality & game world awareness
🔊 Voice Support - Free built-in Google TTS (multi-language) or premium ElevenLabs voices
📐 Plug-and-Play Setup - Just attach CG_NPC.gd to any CharacterBody3D — no special scene structure needed
🌍 Game Context Injection - NPCs reference your actual game world naturally in conversation
🎭 Static or Patrolling - NPC behavior with obstacle avoidance via RayCast3D
👤 Player Name Detection - Automatically finds and uses the player's name in conversation
🎮 Solo & Multiplayer - Compatible with both game modes
⚙️ Inspector Configured - Fully configurable without diving into code

⚡ Setup in 4 Steps:
1. Attach CG_NPC.gd to your NPC node
2. Assign an Area3D interaction zone
3. Paste your Groq API key
4. Walk up and press E

📦 Requirements:
Godot 4.4+
Free Groq API key (groq.com)
ElevenLabs paid plan (only if using premium voice)
Android & Desktop supported

name: AdMob Plugin for Godot 4.4
short_description: A complete, production-ready AdMob plugin for Godot 4.4 with support for banner, interstitial, rewarded, and native ads — Android only.
description:
📱 GodotAdMob — Full AdMob Integration for Godot 4.4 (Android)

✨ Key Features:
📺 Multiple Ad Formats - Full support for Banner, Interstitial, Rewarded Video, Rewarded Interstitial & Native ads
🚀 Production-Ready - Tested and used in live apps on Google Play Store
⚡ Easy Integration - Single script attachment, no complex setup or external dependencies
🎯 Smart Ad Caching - Automatic pre-loading of next ads for seamless user experience
📱 Android Optimized - Built specifically for Android with native Java/Kotlin bridge
🔧 Test Mode Built-In - One-click test ads during development (no real revenue impact)
🧩 Flexible Placement - Attach to any Control or Node2D, or call from any script
📊 Analytics Ready - Optional callbacks for ad impressions, revenue tracking & errors
⏱️ Load Time Optimization - Async loading that won't block your game thread
🎮 Supports Godot 4.4 - Fully tested and compatible with latest stable version

⚡ Setup in 4 Steps:
1. Download the .pck or add plugin files to res://addons/godotadmob/
2. Enable the plugin in Project Settings → Plugins
3. Add your AdMob App ID and Ad Unit IDs to the inspector
4. Call `AdMob.show_banner()` or `AdMob.show_interstitial()` from any script

📦 Requirements:
Godot 4.4 (tested & verified)
Google AdMob account (free, admob.google.com)
Android export template
Android only (no iOS support)

name: Unity Ads Plugin for Godot 4.4
short_description: A complete, production-ready Unity Ads plugin for Godot 4.4 with support for banner, interstitial, and rewarded ads — Android only.
description:
📱 GodotUnityAds — Full Unity Ads Integration for Godot 4.4 (Android)

✨ Key Features:
📺 Multiple Ad Formats - Full support for Banner, Interstitial & Rewarded Video ads
🚀 Production-Ready - Tested and used in live apps with Unity Ads SDK 4.12.3
⚡ Easy Integration - Zero manifest editing required, plugin auto-injects all permissions and Activity declarations
🔁 Auto-Retry Built-In - Automatically retries failed ad loads after 5 seconds, no extra code needed
🎯 Smart Ad Caching - Auto-reloads next ad after show or failure for seamless user experience
📱 Android Optimized - Built specifically for Android with native Java/Kotlin bridge
🔧 Test Mode Built-In - One-click test ads during development (no real revenue impact)
🧩 Flexible Placement - Call from any script via global UnityAds autoload singleton
📊 Full Signal Coverage - 12 signals for every ad lifecycle event including load, show, earn and fail
🎮 Supports Godot 4.4 - Fully tested and compatible with latest stable version

⚡ Setup in 4 Steps:
1. Download and copy addons/unity_ads_plugin/ into your project root
2. Enable the plugin in Project Settings → Plugins
3. Replace GAME_ID in UnityAds.gd with your ID from Unity Dashboard
4. Call `UnityAds.initialize()` then `UnityAds.load_interstitial()` and `UnityAds.show_interstitial()` from any script

📦 Requirements:
Godot 4.4 (tested & verified)
Unity Gaming Services account (free, cloud.unity.com)
Android export template
Android only (no iOS support)

name: Godot Profile System - Supabase Auth + UI
short_description: Complete authentication and profile management system for Godot 4 with Supabase backend — login, register, avatar picker, stats tracking, and editable profiles.
description:
📝 Godot Profile System — Production-Ready Authentication for Godot 4

✨ Key Features:
🔐 Complete Auth Flow - Login, Register, Edit Profile, Delete Account, Logout
🖼️ Avatar System - Built-in avatar grid, phone image import, custom avatars
📊 Stats Tracking - Automatic playtime tracking, custom stats (XP, wins, quests)
⚙️ Settings Manager - Sound, music, language, difficulty preferences persist across sessions
💾 Cloud Storage - All profiles saved to Supabase (PostgreSQL backend)
📡 Signal Based - Easy integration with profile_loaded, profile_updated, auth_failed signals
🎮 Game Ready - Built for multiplayer games, works with any network setup
🔄 Auto-Login - Remembers last user, logs in automatically on next launch
📱 Cross-Platform - Works on PC, Android, iOS — same codebase
🔧 No Auth UI Setup - Drop the ProfileUI.tscn scene and it just works

⚡ Setup in 5 Steps:
1. Add PlayerProfileManager.gd as autoload in project settings
2. Create Supabase project and run the provided SQL schema
3. Copy your Supabase URL and anon key into the script
4. Add ProfileUI.tscn to your main scene
5. Call `PlayerProfileManager.authenticate_and_load(username, password)`

📦 Package Includes:
- PlayerProfileManager.gd — Core auth and data management
- ProfileUI.tscn — Complete UI with all panels (auth, create, edit)
- Default avatar image
- Full SQL schema with RLS policies
- Complete setup guide (README.md)

🎯 Use Cases:
- Single-player games with cloud saves
- Multiplayer games with persistent profiles
- Mobile games with cross-device sync
- Any Godot game needing user accounts

📊 Data Tracked:
- Playtime (total, daily, sessions)
- Win/loss records, streaks
- Custom stats (levels, XP, currency)
- Unlocked items, houses, cars, weapons
- Last position and map for open world games

🔗 Dependencies:
- Godot 4.0 or higher
- Supabase account (free tier works)
- No additional plugins required

📁 File Structure:
```
addons/player_profile/
├── PlayerProfileManager.gd
├── ProfileUI.tscn
├── CGLive.png
└── README.md
```

🚀 Why Buy?
Save 2-3 weeks of building auth, UI, avatar system, and Supabase integration. Used in production open world multiplayer games. Battle-tested, documented, and supported.

💬 Support:
- Setup guide included
- WhatsApp support available
- Free consultation for integration

⚠️ Requirements:
- Supabase account (free at supabase.com)
- Basic understanding of HTTP requests (not required, just plug and play)

📱 Platform Support:
- PC (Windows, Linux, macOS) ✓
- Android ✓
- iOS ✓
- Web (HTML5) ✓
